name: Conway Twitty Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 large can of cooled whipped topping (cool whip)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients for the first group and press into a greased 9 x 13 inch pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
3. For the second group of ingredients, mix half of the cooled whipped topping with cream cheese and sugar. Spread this mixture over the pressed ingredient layer.
4. For the third group of ingredients, beat the remaining cooled whipped topping until stiff peaks form. Place on top of the cream cheese layer and spread evenly.
5. Top with the remaining half of the cooled whipped topping.
